landing.description: Revix turns your modules, levels and exam dates into a day-by-day plan — realistic, balanced, and adaptive when you miss a session.
landing.featuresSubtitle: Tools built for students aiming for excellence without sacrificing their evenings.
landing.feature1Desc: Upload your course or tutorial sheet. Revix detects chapters, key concepts and difficulty — you review before importing.
landing.feature2Desc: At D-7, your plan shifts strategy: fewer new chapters, more repetition, shorter and more focused sessions.
landing.feature3Desc: A missed session is never lost. It's redistributed over the next days without breaking your overall plan.
landing.howSubtitle: From added module to generated plan, frictionless.
landing.step1Desc: Name, exam date, chapters — added manually or extracted from a PDF.
landing.step2Desc: Not understood, average, mastered — per chapter, so the AI prioritizes correctly.
landing.step3Desc: Free days and hours per day. Revix handles the rest, breaks included.
landing.step4Desc: Interactive calendar, flashcards, quizzes, and a real-time progress dashboard.
landing.ctaTitle: Ready to transform how you study?
landing.ctaDesc: Create your free account and generate your first personalized schedule in minutes.

auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to pick up your plan right where you left it.
